# DAS Group LLC

> DAS Group LLC builds applied AI products for legal workflows, support operations, product execution, compliance work, commerce operations, and local-first knowledge work.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://dasgroupllc.com/): Portfolio overview, product categories, and direct answers about the company.
- [Portfolio full context](https://dasgroupllc.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded company and product context in one file.

## Product index

- [CourtFile](https://courtfile.dasgroupllc.com/): Court filing review workflows and matter-brief generation for litigation teams.
- [CiteClear](https://citeclear.dasgroupllc.com/): Citation verification and source-quality review.
- [SpecBot](https://specbot.dasgroupllc.com/): Linear issue quality gates for cleaner engineering handoff.
- [ResolveAI for Shopify](https://resolveai.dasgroupllc.com/): Policy-aware autonomous support resolution for Shopify merchants.
- [ResolveAI for Zendesk](https://resolveai-zendesk.dasgroupllc.com/): Outcome-based AI ticket resolution for Zendesk teams.
- [ProfitPulse AI](https://profitpulse-ai.dasgroupllc.com/): Profit-leak detection and margin protection for Shopify stores.
- [ThoughtLint](https://thoughtlint.dasgroupllc.com/): Local-first Obsidian plugin for reasoning review.
- [ProtoVid](https://dasgroupllc.com/protovid/): Figma prototype export to MP4 and GIF.

## Portfolio summary

- DAS Group products are organized around concrete jobs rather than generic AI assistance.
- Typical portfolio themes: grounded workflows, explicit guardrails, measurable outputs, and machine-readable product context.
- Primary audiences: litigation teams, support teams, product and engineering teams, Shopify merchants, and knowledge workers.

## Contact

- Support: support@dasgroupllc.com
